'''GX-8''' was a [[sewing assistant droid]] that was employed by [[Arta Kleidun]], owner of [[Black Spire Outfitters]], to help keep up with demand at her store. It<ref name="TravelersGuide" /> helped with mending [[clothing]] and other minor sewing tasks<ref name="GEStaff">{{GEStaff|Black Spire Outfitters|store}}</ref> using its many [[Limb|arms]], each one of which was specially designed for mending and sewing garments.<ref name="TravelersGuide" />

In [[34 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]] to [[34 ABY]].</ref> during the [[First Order]] [[Battle of Batuu|occupation]] of the [[planet]] [[Batuu]],<ref name="SWGEBSO" /> GX-8 sat in power-down mode in its stall<ref name="GEStaff" /> within Black Spire Outfitters, which was located in [[Black Spire Outpost]] on Batuu.<ref name="SWGEBSO" /> Also in that [[Standard year|year]],<ref name="GuideDate">{{TravelersGuidetoBatuuDate}}</ref> the [[droid]] was mentioned in ''[[Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'', a [[book]] written by [[historian]] [[Eloc Throno]].<ref name="TravelersGuide" /> GX-8 had [[Color|orange]], black, and white plating and a black [[sensor]].<ref name="SWGEBSO" />

==Behind the scenes==
GX-8 first appeared as a prop within the themed land [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]],<ref name="SWGEBSO" /> which opened to guests at [[Disneyland]] Park and [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]] in [[2019]].<ref name="D23">{{D23|url=creatures-droids-and-aliens-meet-the-fantastical-figures-of-star-wars-galaxys-edge|text=Creatures, Droids, and Aliens: Meet the Fantastical Figures of ''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge}}</ref> Its design was inspired by a [[medical droid]].<ref name="GEStaff" />
